name: review-deep-loop
description: Autonomous deep software review laboratory — systematically audits architecture, completeness, code quality, infrastructure, security, and operational readiness. Powered by 16 specialized AI agents with an 8-phase pipeline.

plugins.name: review-deep-loop
plugins.description: Autonomous deep review pipeline with 8-phase audit, 16 specialized agents, quality gates, hard blocks, C4 framework scoring, and loop-back mechanism for re-review cycles. Point it at a codebase, walk away, come back to a comprehensive findings report with threat models and remediation plan.
